items.name_en: B Brand Pure TB Quilted Sheepskin Lauren Mini Bucket Bag, single shoulder or crossbody. Crafted from imported selected soft lamb leather with a smooth, comfortable touch and fine texture. The material is thick and smooth, maintaining shape. Decorated with signature quilting. Filled for a soft feel. Features a Thomas exclusive logo, minimalist modern silhouette, and a gold chain strap. Hidden magnetic closure with 3 card slots. Lightweight and practical. 20X16X4cm

items.name_en: ❤️B Brand Latest Zippered Crossbody Bag, made from protective cotton blend fabric. Decorated with fine B Brand exclusive check fabric, echoing the B-shaped accessory design, presenting a square silhouette, incorporating geometric topstitching details. Lined with lambskin, featuring an adjustable calfskin shoulder strap for switching between crossbody and shoulder styles. Dimensions 20x 6.5x 15.5cm.

items.name_en: ❤️Envelope Bag with Flap and Patchwork Leather, Shoulder/Crossbody Bag. Body made of Brand Vintage Retro Check Eco-friendly Canvas + Smooth Italian Tanned Leather. Eye-catching check print and contrasting topstitching, stiff and structured material, super eye-catching. Looks very high-end, the patchwork leather fully interprets the brand's British style! Design inspired by Trench coat collar shape, named after founder Thomas Bur's wife Catherine. Minimalist square style with a special design, very low-key yet identifiable. Snap button closure on both sides of the flap, decent capacity for daily needs, adjustable shoulder strap, versatile use, looks good in any style, can also be used as a clutch. Really great, very versatile for work or outings, suitable for all seasons, highly recommended! Dimensions: 24X17.5X5.5cm
